attr.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 4: Episode II
attr.desc: Sonic The Hedgehog 4: Episode II via Android libfox.so so-loader. BYO-data: requires your legal APK and cache ZIP/OBB. Native gameplay, audio, controller, pause, save/continue and SELECT+START exit.
attr.inst: Copy sonic-the-hedgehog-4-episode-ii-2.0.0.apk and cache-sonic-the-hedgehog-4-episode-ii-2.0.0.zip or main.22.com.sega.sonic4episode2.obb to the sonic4ep2 folder, then launch once to extract.
